steps.title: Spot the defining contrast
steps.content: Alexander “was at work almost constantly” while he “avoided the clubs and usually dined alone”—the pairing shows his entire schedule was occupied by work.

steps.title: Apply the signal to the choices
steps.content: Choice C (Continuously) means uninterrupted work filling the entire day. Imperceptibly, fearfully, and hastily each suggest inappropriate qualities: invisibility, an emotional state, and haste. That matches choice C — C is correct.
